title: Demand Validation System
golden_rule: If no demand evidence: DO NOT CREATE PAGE.
evidence_required: ONE of: exact GSC query | autocomplete pattern | competitor ranking page | repeated query template | clear calculator demand

people_also_ask.method: Check PAA box for related questions

related_searches.method: Google related searches at SERP bottom

internal_query_pattern.method: Mine GSC data for query templates

validation_process: Check GSC query data for exact or template match
Check autocomplete via browser if needed
Check if competitors rank for this query
Record evidence source in page metadata
